programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Irene agrees to meet college classmate Andy after years apart and then panics Dr Todd wrote a book about open marriage but finds his own marriage in jeopardy as he meets admirer Nan Adams ex-wife Betty boards with new fiance Lance

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: The district manager comes to the research center for a visit On a tour of the jungle reserve she injured herself in a trap

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Max has met a lovely woman who seems to enjoy his company also -- but shes part of a theft ring that cleaned out the Harts

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: After the key witness in the upcoming trial of a shady landlord dies Cagney and Lacey must re-canvas his building in search of new witnesses before he gets set free Meanwhile Chris has a pregnancy scare

programme.title: Starsky 308
programme.desc: Starsky 308

programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element

programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Hooterville finally has their Volunteer Fire Department but find they are unable to put out a fire that started on the Cannonball Express

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe sees a way to make money when two escaped convicts are seen in Hooterville Joe plans to capture them and get the reward money

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While passing through a small town Eric is shot and buried by a deranged cop-wannabe who is murdering vagrants while impersonating a police officer Alamo Joe catches up to Eric and Eric convinces him that the phony cop is a serial killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes into a town looking for Skorzany after hearing about several murders by a skinwalker He learns from a Native American medicine man that there may be a cure In the end Eric finds out that the cure was a lie and he moves on

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Determined to prevent Nick from taking all the glory for solving another murder case Schanke captures the killer on his own -- or so he thinks

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Mickis young nephew befriends the reanimated corpse of a boy residing in the local haunted house

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A photographer whos anxious to get her career back on track gets some unexpected help on her latest photo shoots from Freddy whos terrorizing her models Meanwhile three FBI agents come to Springwood to investigate a family homicide but Freddy has some surprises in store for them

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A sculptor uses a drifter and his own abused girlfriend to recreate a murdersuicide

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Smarmy and opportunistic reality TV show host Jerry Rulac does an expose on the wild punk nightclub scene for the latest segment of his television program Why Are You Here Jerry uncovers more than he bargained for when he decides to focus on troubled wealthy party girl Donette and her unpredictable gaggle of scary friends

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ brokers a reconciliation between Lil and her estranged father while also assisting Lil in fending off a crooked mining executive and his goons who are determined to lay claim to her gold mine

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed wins 100 in Wilburs name when he correctly answers a contest question over the telephone Wilbur now has a chance to win 5000 but hes going to need Eds help

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Carol head out to Pine Lake Lodge for a little rest and relaxation leaving Ed at home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: During an operation to send out twenty Allied soldiers two of them attempt an early escape and are nearly captured

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan talks Klink into building an officers club whereby a boat can be built to sail away with an escaped British POW and the German gunsight he snagged while escaping

programme.title: Mchale 333
programme.desc: Mchale 333

programme.title: Mchale 405
programme.desc: Mchale 405

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Opie Taylor runs away from Mayberry to join the Marines

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A bet between sergeants and Sergeant Carters lies result in Gomer dating Miss Camp Henderson and taking her to Lookout Point

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After somebody breaks into the supply hut everyone suspects that a killer may be on the island--except for the Skipper who thinks that it may be part of a voodoo curse

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper and Mr Howell compete for leadership on the island by being named President When the castaways cast their votes the result is surprising

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E30
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E30

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa Luke Kate Hassie and Little Luke McCoy travel from Smokey Corners West Virginia to California They take over an inherited farm and everyone loves it but Grandpa who has trouble adjusting to the new place

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is moonlighting as a private investigator when cutbacks hit CONTROL

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS can send out sonic booms at will and threatens New York City with one

programme.title: The Presidents Man
programme.desc: A US presidents highly classified secret agent must find a fearless replacement to take over his extremely dangerous military missions

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Tennis pro Maureen Mitchell Brenda Benet runs into sportswriter John Ballard Bill Bixby who defamed her in his column Cyril Wolfe Milton Berle annoys his wife Anita Audra Lindley and fellow passengers Lynn Adams and Britt Leach with constant practical jokes Mexican April Lopez Charo stows away in a laundry hamper

programme.desc: WKRP 223

programme.title: WKRP 205
programme.desc: WKRP 205

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: When a Hollywood film crew arrives in town to shoot a Civil War mini-series the townsfolk flock to play extras Wood is cast as a Confederate colonel The shoot is beset with problems including temperamental actress Shelly Darling

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Everyone is dealing with issues at Christmastime Wood is so tired of his childrens materialism that he donates all of their gifts to a hard-luck family in the neighborhood

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Mother Mishkin tries to nail shady real estate developer Worthmeyer and thinks her life is in danger from him so she hires Dan to protect her Meanwhile Dan recruits bumbling Binzer to repossess a car from deadbeat Freddie Tibbs

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Two of the Harts friends are suspects in the murder of a famous divorce attorney -- and they arent answering Jennifers and Jonathans questions

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing gifts the chance to make things right to three criminals who break out of Houma Prison

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: On a planned de-stressing holiday Arcane is attacked by an old enemy who is supposed to be locked away in an asylum But LaRoche is a master of hypnotism and forces unlikely allies to help him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter the Voyager space probe that has been wandering the cosmos propelled by the Queller drive- a faulty engine system Following the probe is a fleet of alien ships from a world devastated by the drive

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.desc: Family friend Swamp Molly asks Bo and Luke to deliver a load of moonshine but the shipment is really illegal firearms

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Police captain William Boone is asked to join the security team of Companion Daan of the Taelon an alien race that came to earth three years ago

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMFs target is Poltroni an international drug dealer Poltroni alias Ted Carson is in a country with no extradition treaty with the United States Briggs devises a plan to lure Poltroni to a neighboring country where he can be arrested and sent to the US To execute the scheme Barney will have to fight for his life against one of Poltronis thugs while Cinammon will be bait for Poltroni Also getting Poltroni to the border wont be easy Its about 100 miles away

programme.desc: A fake mind reader recognizes Dr Kimble To bolster TV ratings for his act he provides the police with clues designed to show his psychic prowess

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: Brotherhood of Justice
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves Kiefer Sutherland and Billy Zane star as high-school students who start a vigilante group to combat crime in their neighborhood

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Ron Levin a wealthy businessman has disappeared No body is found but there was a list with instructions in his house - a recipe for murder Its author Joe Hunt is the defendant The successful young business man had formed a team of prestigious former fellow students for a risky project which should make them all rich His partners claim they didnt know about the means

programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Colton Cronkite v. Todd Vatcher

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.desc: Sean Michaels starts the day either training or in the sauna, but his favorite part of MMA is hard sparring! In this episode, Sean shares his tactics for the fight, how he evaluates his opponent and how patience pays off.

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A warp zone that only opens every 1000 video years is the gateway for King Charles who wants to go home But his final decision is send Gameboy at his place The supercomputer Gameboy turns out to be a lot of trouble for the N team But things get worse when Mother Brain gets Gameboy and and Dr Wily turns him into Game Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and the N Team are off to Hyrule to meet Kevins favorite game hero Link and Princess Zelda Mother Brain gives the Potion of Power to Gannon that restores an evil wizard to his rightful form

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger uses a time portal to change Earths history The team must stop him or they themselves may cease to exist

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids meet Lorn - an orphan boy with a magic talisman - and invite him to join the team But Lorns talisman is more dangerous than any of them realizes

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce follows a clue to Audric and meets up with the gambler Vendetta who has a tape regarding his father but Jayce has to win it in a game It is a trap laid by Saw Boss Vendetta plays a game with Herc to settle an old debt of Hercs

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gar lies to his son and daughter Octo and Seena saying Audric stole the root that he developed and that Jayce has taken credit for everything Gar is taken by Saw Boss and instructs Octo to get help from the Lightning League

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: The Statue of Liberty fails to reappear during Wondros magic act and ends up in a field in Iowa But VENOM has further plans to hold Lady Liberty for ransom

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Out in the New Orleans Bayou Jacques Lancaster has been using sap from the fire trees as a powerful but volatile fuel Miles Mayhem wants to use it to power VENOMs vehicles
